| Approve Search settings | John | Day 1 |
| Build & link lead form | You | Day 2 |

---

## 7. 90-Day Recovery Roadmap

| Phase | Timeline | Goal | Success Criteria |
|-----------|------------|-----------------------------------|----------------------|
| Stabilize | Week 1–2 | Validate leads <= $20 | 3+ leads per test |
| Optimize | Weeks 3–6 | Refine keywords, improve CRM flow | CPL down 20% |
| Scale | Weeks 7–12 | Reintroduce FB at $150/test | 10+ leads/week |
context: From document: # Lead Strategy Recovery Plan – May 2025 — chunk 4 (chunk 4/4)
